author: osy
message:
docs: add /utm-review and /utm-submit agent contribution workflows

Add agent-neutral workflows that walk an AI coding tool through reviewing a
change against the contribution guidelines and then opening or updating a pull
request to utmapp/UTM with the required AI attribution and human-testing
attestation.

The canonical instructions live in .agents/skills/ (auto-discovered by Codex,
Cursor, Amp, Zed, Copilot, Windsurf, OpenCode, Antigravity, and others), with
thin slash-command shims for Claude Code (.claude/commands/) and OpenCode
(.opencode/command/). AGENTS.md is trimmed to the essentials and points at the
workflows, and CONTRIBUTING.md now directs contributors to use them.

Assisted-by: Claude:claude-opus-4-8
